headline: A Look At Exxon Mobil (XOM) Valuation As Long Term Returns Contrast With Mixed Recent Share Price Moves
summary: What Exxon Mobil (XOM) offers investors right now Exxon Mobil (XOM) continues to draw investor attention as a large integrated energy company with operations across upstream production, fuels, chemicals, and specialty products, along with an active push into lower emission opportunities. With a market value of about US$619.4b and annual revenue of roughly US$323.9b, Exxon Mobil sits at the center of global energy supply, spanning the United States, Canada, and a wide range of international...
